goal: 修复 sync 反复输出 Auto-pinned backfill_explicit

summary.title: 修复 backfill auto-pin 重复报告
summary.what: 修复 `Pin()` 的 note cache 范围：除了最近 `Check.Lookback` 个 main commit，现在也会把 sealed/proposed intent 的 explicit `BackfillCommits` 加入 `NotesForCommits` 预取集合，并把短 hash 解析抽成同一 helper。新增 past-lookback 回归测试，覆盖 backfill commit 已经落在 lookback 窗口外但 note 已存在时，后续 `Sync()` 不应再次返回同一 `backfill_explicit` link。
summary.why: 用户看到 `mainline sync` 每次都重复打印同一批 `Auto-pinned ... (backfill_explicit)`。根因是 explicit backfill 的幂等检查依赖 note cache，但 cache 只覆盖最近 main commits；老 backfill commit 上已有 note 也会被误判为缺失。修复后，backfill 的幂等性不再受 main lookback 窗口影响。
summary.user_goal: 修复 sync 反复输出 Auto-pinned backfill_explicit

decisions.chose: 把 explicit BackfillCommits 加入 Pin 的 notes 预取集合。
decisions.rationale: backfill 目标本来就是显式 commit 列表，不应依赖最近 main log 窗口；预取目标 notes 可以保持批量读取路径，同时让 alreadyHasIntentCached 看到窗口外 note。

decisions.chose: 复用 resolvePinCommit 解析短 hash，再用于预取和 pin loop。
decisions.rationale: 旧事件可能存短 hash；预取和实际写入必须用相同的规范化规则，否则又会出现 full-hash cache miss。

rejected.alternative: 增大 Check.Lookback 或在 CLI 层隐藏 AutoPinned 输出
rejected.reason: 这只会掩盖当前 dogfood 历史，不能保证任意旧 backfill commit 的幂等性；正确边界是 explicit backfill target 自身。

review_notes: 实际 dogfood 验证使用当前源码连续运行两次 `go run . sync --json`，两次结果都没有 `auto_pinned` 字段。
`go test ./internal/engine` 全包在本机两次超时于不同既有测试；对应测试单独运行通过，本轮采用 focused engine/backfill/reconcile 测试和 core/domain/cli 包测试作为验证证据。

architectural_claims: Explicit backfill auto-pin idempotence must be based on notes attached to the explicit target commits, not on whether those commits are inside the main lookback window.
Short-hash normalization for backfill targets must be shared by cache prefetch and note-writing paths.
behavioral_changes: `mainline sync` no longer re-reports `backfill_explicit` links for explicit backfill commits older than `Check.Lookback` when the commit note already references the intent.
Pin's batched note cache now includes both recent main log commits and explicit backfill target commits.
Regression coverage now creates a past-lookback backfill commit and asserts a later Sync does not re-pin that intent.
